arts.ttl: New striker Michael Noonan, 16, 'ready to play' for Shamrock Rovers as Molde test loomspoll league of ireland
arts.sum: Noonan was snapped up from St Pat’s over the close season and in freezing cold Molde last night, Bradley said: “I think Michael is ready to play. Stephen Bradley insists teenage striker Michael Noonan is ready to step up for Shamrock Rovers in Europe.

arts.ttl: Stephen Bradley identifies 'best bit of business Shamrock Rovers have done in a long time'
arts.sum: But he penned a fresh long-term Rovers deal last month and Bradley said of the versatile attacker: “He's one of the best pieces of business we've done in a long time. “He played in the 6, the 8, the 10 and I think he scored three goals in the friendly game in Spain last week.

arts.ttl: Molde send bullish warning to Shamrock Rovers ahead of European tie
arts.sum: Rovers have been stronger in Europe this season and finished 10th in the standings after the new league phase, while Molde crept into the knockouts in 23rd. “It's an interesting team as they try to play when they get good space and I see that in the way they attack, they use their strength.

arts.ttl: How Shamrock Rovers fans saved their club from extinction and laid foundations for nights like this
arts.sum: So much so that James Nolan and Dave Carpenter both remember “packing the entire club into the boot of a car” after ‘home’ games at Tolka Park. Die-hard fans formed the ‘400 club’, each stumping up €40-a-month to keep the club going while new owners were sought.

arts.ttl: Preview: Molde vs. Shamrock Rovers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Conference League clash between Molde and Shamrock Rovers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
